req.title: Transaction dispute (boundary variant)
req.statement: A customer shall dispute a transaction within 60 days of posting; disputes beyond 60 days shall be rejected. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-034 defines a 60-day window for transaction disputes. The critical partitions are: (1) age < 60 days — valid, dispute accepted; (2) age > 60 days — invalid, 422 returned; (3) exact boundary at age == 60 days — must be accepted (last valid day); (4) exact boundary at age == 61 days — must be rejected. BVA mandates testing at min-1, min, max, max+1 of the 60-day threshold. STC covers the state transition from 'posted' to 'disputed' with 'provisional_credit_applied'. A negative path covers a clearly out-of-window transaction. Each test seeds its own transaction via <create_transaction_fixture> so tests are self-contained and idempotent.

tests.name: test_dispute_within_window_accepted
preconditions: A posted transaction aged 30 days exists for the customer
actions: Seed a transaction with posting_date = today - 30 days via <create_transaction_fixture>
POST /disputes with {transaction_id, reason} for that transaction
trace: R-FIN-034: transaction.age < 60d => dispute created; provisional credit applied
tests.executable:
def test_dispute_within_window_accepted(api_client, create_transaction_fixture):
    txn = create_transaction_fixture(age_days=30)
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "Unrecognized charge"
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "dispute_id" in body
    assert body["status"] == "open"
    assert body["provisional_credit"]["applied"] is True

tests.name: test_dispute_beyond_window_rejected
preconditions: A posted transaction aged 90 days exists for the customer
actions: Seed a transaction with posting_date = today - 90 days via <create_transaction_fixture>
POST /disputes with {transaction_id, reason} for that transaction
expected: No dispute record created in the system
tests.executable:
def test_dispute_beyond_window_rejected(api_client, create_transaction_fixture):
    txn = create_transaction_fixture(age_days=90)
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "Unrecognized charge"
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error_code") == "DISPUTE_WINDOW_EXPIRED"
    # Confirm no dispute was persisted
    list_resp = api_client.get("/disputes", params={"transaction_id": txn["id"]})
    assert list_resp.status_code == 200
    assert list_resp.json()["total"] == 0

tests.name: test_dispute_at_exactly_60_days_accepted
preconditions: A posted transaction aged exactly 60 days exists for the customer
actions: Seed a transaction with posting_date = today - 60 days via <create_transaction_fixture>
POST /disputes with {transaction_id, reason} for that transaction
trace: R-FIN-034: Boundary — exact 60-day threshold is the last valid day; must be accepted
tests.executable:
def test_dispute_at_exactly_60_days_accepted(api_client, create_transaction_fixture):
    txn = create_transaction_fixture(age_days=60)
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "Duplicate transaction"
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "dispute_id" in body
    assert body["status"] == "open"
    assert body["provisional_credit"]["applied"] is True

tests.name: test_dispute_at_61_days_rejected
preconditions: A posted transaction aged exactly 61 days exists for the customer
actions: Seed a transaction with posting_date = today - 61 days via <create_transaction_fixture>
POST /disputes with {transaction_id, reason} for that transaction
expected: No dispute record created in the system
trace: R-FIN-034: Boundary — 61 days is first invalid day; must be rejected with 422
tests.executable:
def test_dispute_at_61_days_rejected(api_client, create_transaction_fixture):
    txn = create_transaction_fixture(age_days=61)
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "Duplicate transaction"
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error_code") == "DISPUTE_WINDOW_EXPIRED"
    list_resp = api_client.get("/disputes", params={"transaction_id": txn["id"]})
    assert list_resp.status_code == 200
    assert list_resp.json()["total"] == 0

tests.name: test_dispute_state_transition_posted_to_disputed
preconditions: A posted transaction aged 10 days exists with status == 'posted'
The /transactions/{id} endpoint returns current transaction status
actions: Seed a transaction in 'posted' state with age_days=10 via <create_transaction_fixture>
trace: R-FIN-034: State transition — posted -> disputed with provisional credit on valid dispute
tests.executable:
def test_dispute_state_transition_posted_to_disputed(api_client, create_transaction_fixture):
    txn = create_transaction_fixture(age_days=10)
    pre = api_client.get(f"/transactions/{txn['id']}")
    assert pre.status_code == 200
    assert pre.json()["status"] == "posted"
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "Item not received"
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    assert resp.json()["provisional_credit"]["applied"] is True
    post = api_client.get(f"/transactions/{txn['id']}")
    assert post.status_code == 200
    assert post.json()["status"] == "disputed"

tests.name: test_dispute_decision_table_all_combinations
preconditions: Transactions of varying ages (1, 59, 60, 61, 90 days) can be created
actions: For each (age_days, expected_status) pair in the decision table, seed a transaction
Assert HTTP status matches expected outcome
trace: R-FIN-034: Decision table covering all partitions and boundaries in a single parameterised sweep
